description: Establish Docker multi-stage builds, .devcontainer for GitHub Codespaces/VS Code, and docker-compose for local service dependencies to make the pipeline fully portable and CI-reproducible.
oracle_notes: No Docker, devcontainer, or docker-compose files exist yet. Track 1 (pixi) handles local env setup but lacks container isolation, which is needed for CI reproducibility, contributor onboarding, and production deployment.
